since_last: 30% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.74%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 30% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.79% · BTC +0.09% · Gold -0.99% · Nasdaq100 +1.68%. 30% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.74%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.74%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -1.01%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +8.68%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +8.68%, PLTR +2.34%, NOW +1.88%, ISRG +1.81%, MSFT +1.23%. Laggards: MU -3.66%, MRVL -2.56%, CRNC -2.39%, LRCX -2.38%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.02% at $172.61
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.02% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
